# DuckDB offline store files live here.
# The .duckdb file and parquet/ exports are git-ignored (see .gitignore).
# They are generated by running:
#   make export-to-duckdb   — export Postgres raw tables into DuckDB
#   make dbt-run            — run dbt models against DuckDB
#   make materialize        — export parquet + push features to Redis
